in the situation in which services are provided to a patient by another entity, under 
arrangement with the HHA, during a 30-day period in which the patient is under the 
HHA's home health plan of care. However, it is in the best interest of future business 
relationships to discuss the situation with any entity that seeks payment from the HHA
